calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Plaintiff's Witness: James Roach was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant 3Nity Enterprise, Inc and Co-Defendant Brian Kim aka Thouchul Brian Kim ind. and dba Green Nature Cleaners.
Exhibit 1 through Exhibit 15-------------------------ID/EVID. (see scanned doc)
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal $164,339.03
Attorney fees $2,500.00
Interest $368.00
Costs $368.00
Total $190,662.45
Plaintiff is entitled to the possession of the leased equipment.
Judgment signed and Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
